resources.string: Meet Aether, your synthetic employee. Aether runs a background heartbeat loop, monitors team channels, detects tasks, and completes them autonomously.
Aether runs in an isolated PRoot-based Alpine Linux environment on your device to run the Node and Python stacks safely.
Aether is Bring Your Own Brain (BYOB). Your API keys are encrypted client-side and stored in your device\'s KeyStore.
Select your operational tier and launch Aether Mesh on this device.
